title: SPELCom_Event Statement Example
description:
SPELCom_Event Statement Example

SPELCom_Event Statement Example

In this example, a SPEL task sends cycle data to the host program.

Function RunParts

		  Integer cycNum

cycNum = 0

		  ' Main loop

		  Do

		    ...

		    ...

		    cycNum = cycNum + 1

SpelCom_Event 3000, cycNum, lot$, cycTime

		  Loop

		Fend
examples:
Function RunParts
		  Integer cycNum

cycNum = 0
		  ' Main loop
		  Do
		    ...
		    ...
		    cycNum = cycNum + 1

			    SpelCom_Event 3000, cycNum, lot$, cycTime
		  Loop
		Fend
